content:
Aditya Gavhane
8177804906|gavhaneaditya718@gmail.com |linkedin.com/in/adityagavhane |github.com/adigavhane1013 |Pune, India
Summary
Final-year CS (AI & Analytics) student with hands-on experience building backend RAG systems, multi-agent workflows,
and automation pipelines. Skilled in designing end-to-end Agentic AI applications using Python, LangChain, CrewAI,
vector databases, and n8n, with emphasis on accuracy, traceability, and system reliability.
Education
MIT Art, Design and T echnology , Pune
B.Tech in Computer Science (AI & Analytics) Aug 2022 – Jun 2026
Experience
IS360 T echnologies & Services Pvt LtdJan 2025 – Jun 2025
Intern Pune, India
•Built an EEG signal processing pipeline using MNE on the PhysioNet EEGMMIDB dataset, extracting alpha, beta,
and theta band powers via FFT into a structured ML-ready dataset.
•Trained and compared 3 classifiers (Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, SVM) with 5-fold cross-validation to
classify Resting and Active brain states.
•Developed a clinician-facing web dashboard for EEG CSV upload, frequency band visualization, and AI-assisted
brain state diagnosis.
Projects
Document-Based Retrieval System|Python, LangChain, FastAPI, ChromaDB, RAGAS, BM25|GitHub
•Built a RAG system using FastAPI, ChromaDB, Groq (Llama-3.3-70b), and Ollama local embeddings with hybrid
dense + BM25 retrieval, cross-encoder reranking, and hallucination guardrails across multi-format documents.
•Integrated an automated RAGAS evaluation pipeline using Google Gemini measuring Faithfulness and Answer
Relevancy per question, with rate-limit handling and a CLI evaluation tool for terminal-based testing.
•Built an evaluation dashboard with per-session score history, trend charts, and a global summary aggregating
Faithfulness, Answer Relevancy, and Hallucination Rate across all sessions to track RAG quality over time.
Multi-Agent Research & Review System|Python, CrewAI, OpenRouter, Tavily, pytest|GitHub
•Built a 3-agent CrewAI pipeline (Researcher→Writer→Validator) with 6-layer hallucination detection across 60

content:
Multi-Agent Research & Review System|Python, CrewAI, OpenRouter, Tavily, pytest|GitHub
•Built a 3-agent CrewAI pipeline (Researcher→Writer→Validator) with 6-layer hallucination detection across 60
research runs evaluating 658 factual claims, achieving 81% avg verification rate with zero fabricated quotes passing
to final output.
•Engineered multi-source retrieval using Tavily + DuckDuckGo + Wikipedia averaging 16 sources per topic, with
automatic model fallback and retry logic delivering cited Markdown documents in avg 2.9 mins.
•Designed pytest guards validating hallucination detection logic including circular citation, semantic mismatch,
duplicate evidence, and source grounding checks, catching and rejecting all failed runs before output was saved.
Daily Remote Job Finder Automation|n8n, MySQL, RSS Feeds, Gmail API|GitHub
•Built an end-to-end automated workflow aggregating remote job listings from 6 RSS feeds (WeWorkRemotely,
RemoteOK, Himalayas, Jobspresso, Working Nomads, Remotive), deduplicating entries, and storing only new jobs
in MySQL on a scheduled 10-hour interval.
•Engineered a smart deduplication pipeline using cross-run link comparison against MySQL and within-run
duplicate removal, ensuring zero repeated job notifications across executions.
•Designed and delivered a responsive HTML email digest via Gmail API, capped at 25 jobs per send with overflow
handling, source-coded badges, and direct apply links, fully automated with error fallback alerts.
Technical Skills
Languages:Python, SQL
AI F rameworks:LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI
T ools:n8n, Git, GitHub, Docker
Databases:MySQL, ChromaDB
Certifications
IBM Machine Learning
AI Agents and Automation

content:
Annexure- 
Selected Problem: BrainHealthPro 
Design Thinking – Empathy 
By field Survey, asking questions, and interviews with users/clients, the team will discuss 
and do Empathy mapping. The team has to prepare a questionnaire for the above activity 
and keep records. Attach all proofs to this document. 
User Say’s: 
• Can this system tell me if I have a serious 
condition? 
• I hope this plan will help me recover quickly. 
• I'm not sure if these exercises are actually 
helping. 
• Can the plan be changed based on how I'm 
feeling? 
• I feel like I'm going through this alone. 
 
 
User Thinks 
• Is this system accurate? Can I trust the 
results? 
• How effective is this compared to 
traditional therapies? 
• Are these exercises actually improving 
my brain health? 
• Can the system adapt if my condition 
changes? 
• I wonder if this system can help me feel 
more hopeful about my recovery. 
What User Does 
• User completes an initial assessment 
questionnaire to context for diagnosis. 
provide additional 
• User may need to remain calm and 
focused during the scanning process to 
ensure accurate data collection. 
• User might share the diagnostic report 
with healthcare providers for a second 
opinion or additional treatment options. 
• User schedules and initiates daily or 
weekly rehabilitation exercises as 
recommended. 
• User periodically reviews progress 
reports generated by the system. 
What User Feels 
• Worried about the possibility of a serious 
neurological condition. 
• Unsure if the system will provide 
accurate or useful results, especially if 
they've had negative experiences before. 
• Determined to improve their condition 
but needing encouragement. 
• Feeling a sense of accomplishment when 
they successfully complete exercises. 
• Feeling optimistic as they see signs of 
progress. 
User

Problem Statement: 
A patient recently diagnosed with a neurological condition is a/ an 
individual who is anxious and uncertain about their future Who 
needs a clear, personalized rehabilitation plan that is easy to follow 
because they feel overwhelmed by their diagnosis and need 
structured, supportive guidance to regain control of their health.

Annexure-  
Ideation 
Sr. 
No. 
Requirement Proposed Solution 
1. EEG-Neurofeedback: Using Brain Waves to Improve Thinking and 
Behavior 
 Available Solutions- 
• Attention and ADHD Treatments: EEG 
neurofeedback is widely used to enhance 
attention and treat ADHD by training 
Individuals to adjust specific brainwave 
frequencies, leading to better focus and 
behavioural control 
• Stress and Anxiety Reduction: ECG 
neurofeedback helps manage stress and 
anxiety by training individuals to regulate 
brainwave patterns linked to relaxation 
and emotional control 
 
 
 
 
Proposed Solution- 
• Personalized Neurofeedback 
Protocols: 
Personalized neurofeedback can be 
enhanced by using machine learning 
to adapt protocols in real-time to an 
individual's brain activity and 
cognitive state, leading to more 
effective results 
• Multimodal Feedback Systems: 
Combining 
EEG with other measures like Heart 
rate or skin conductance creates a 
more comprehensive feedback 
system that better address 
individual needs. 
2. Smart EEG-Based Systems For Health Monitoring and Rehabilitation 
 Available Solutions- 
• Real-time EEG Monitoring: Systems that 
continuously track brain activity to detect 
anomalies or changes in neurological 
conditions 
• Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs): System 
that enable direct communication between 
the brain and external devices, aiding in 
motor function recovery and cognitive 
training 
 
 
 
Proposed Solution- 
• Multimodal Systems: Combining 
EEG with other physiological 
signals to create a mare 
comprehensive health monitoring 
and rehabilitation system. 
• Wearable EEG Devices: Create 
more comfortable and user-
friendly EEG devices for easy use 
in daily life, both for monitoring 
and rehabilitation.

3. Cognitive Enhancement and Brain Health Maintenance 
 Available Solutions- 
• General cognitive training apps that do not 
adapt to the user's specific cognitive 
strengths and weaknesses 
• Limited access to professional cognitive 
therapy, especially for preventive brain 
health. 
 
 
 
Proposed Solution- 
Create a cognitive training platform 
using EEG data to personalize exercise 
routines for enhancing brain function 
and preventing cognitive decline. The 
platform adjusts exercises in real-time 
based on brain activity, providing a 
highly tailored and effective cognitive 
enhancement experience. 
Solution- 
Create a system using wearable EEGs and AI to diagnose neurological conditions, provide 
personalized rehab plans, and offer adaptive cognitive exercises, with continuous 
monitoring and user-friendly interfaces.  
Scope- 
This project enhances brain disorder diagnosis and treatment by analyzing EEG data, 
offering doctors accurate insights and personalized treatment plans. It also includes a 
mobile app that provides tailored cognitive exercises to improve individual brain health, 
ensuring a comprehensive and personalized approach to neurological care.
